description: Fix every CSS custom property, class, and component deviation from the RetroUI source code across the docs site and Chrome extension side panel. Every color value, shadow, border, font, hover effect, and active state must be identical to RetroUI.

userStories.title: Fix --muted light mode value in both docs and side panel CSS
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the --muted CSS custom property to match RetroUI's exact value so muted backgrounds render correctly.
userStories.notes: RetroUI global.css line 51: --muted: #d5d5d5. Both OpenTabs files have --muted: #aeaeae. Two edits: (1) docs/src/styles/global.css line 51: change #aeaeae to #d5d5d5. (2) platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/styles.css line 46: change #aeaeae to #d5d5d5.

userStories.title: Fix --border dark mode value in both docs and side panel CSS
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the dark mode --border CSS custom property to match RetroUI's exact value so dark borders have correct visibility.
userStories.notes: RetroUI global.css line 82: .dark { --border: #5c5c5c }. Both OpenTabs files have --border: #3a3a3a in dark mode. (1) docs/src/styles/global.css line 78: change #3a3a3a to #5c5c5c. (2) platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/styles.css line 72: change #3a3a3a to #5c5c5c.

userStories.title: Replace hardcoded rgba in tool-pulse animation with RetroUI token
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the tool-pulse keyframe to use the RetroUI --primary token instead of a hardcoded rgba color.
acceptanceCriteria: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/styles.css @keyframes tool-pulse 50% frame uses color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 5%, transparent) instead of rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.05)
platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/styles.css @keyframes tool-pulse 0%,100% frame uses transparent instead of rgba(245, 158, 11, 0)
userStories.notes: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/styles.css lines 99-102: rgba(245, 158, 11, ...) is hardcoded amber (#f59e0b), not even close to RetroUI --primary (#ffdb33). Change to: 0%, 100% { background-color: transparent; } 50% { background-color: color-mix(in srgb, var(--primary) 5%, transparent); }

userStories.title: Fix Accordion content dark-mode hardcoded bg-white text-gray-700
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the Accordion content area to use theme tokens instead of hardcoded light-mode colors so it works in dark mode.
acceptanceCriteria: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/retro/Accordion.tsx AccordionContent className uses 'bg-card text-card-foreground' instead of 'bg-white text-gray-700'
Accordion content renders white background with dark text in light mode
Accordion content renders dark background with light text in dark mode
userStories.notes: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/retro/Accordion.tsx line 48: 'bg-white text-gray-700'. RetroUI Accordion.tsx line 52 uses the same hardcoded values, but RetroUI's demo site doesn't support dark mode toggling inside the accordion content. Since OpenTabs supports dark mode, these must be mapped to semantic tokens. bg-white -> bg-card (resolves to #fff light, #242424 dark). text-gray-700 -> text-card-foreground (resolves to #000 light, #f5f5f5 dark). Edit line 48: replace 'bg-white text-gray-700' with 'bg-card text-card-foreground'.

userStories.title: Fix PluginIcon SVG rect rx attribute to 0
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the PluginIcon SVG to have sharp corners matching RetroUI's --radius: 0.
acceptanceCriteria: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/PluginIcon.tsx SVG rect has rx='0' or no rx attribute instead of rx='1'
userStories.notes: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/PluginIcon.tsx line 22: <rect ... rx='1' />. RetroUI --radius: 0 means all corners are sharp. Change rx='1' to rx='0' or remove the rx attribute entirely.

userStories.title: Fix docs Starlight light-mode gray overrides to use RetroUI tokens
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all Starlight CSS variable overrides to reference RetroUI tokens instead of hardcoded hex values.
userStories.notes: docs/src/styles/global.css lines 172-174. Three hardcoded values: --sl-color-gray-5: #e5e5e5 -> var(--muted). --sl-color-gray-6: #f0f0f0 -> var(--card). --sl-color-gray-7: #f8f8f8 -> var(--background). After US-001, --muted will be #d5d5d5 which is a reasonable gray-5 replacement.

userStories.title: Add active press state to docs search, mobile menu, and social icons
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all interactive elements in the docs site to have the full RetroUI button press effect including the active:translate-x-1 shift.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/src/styles/global.css search button has active state: box-shadow: none; transform: translate(1px, 2px)
docs/src/styles/global.css mobile menu button has active state: box-shadow: none; transform: translate(1px, 2px)
docs/src/styles/global.css social icon links have active state: box-shadow: none; transform: translate(1px, 2px)
docs/src/overrides/ThemeSelect.astro active state has transform: translate(1px, 2px) instead of just translateY(2px)
userStories.notes: RetroUI Button default variant: hover:translate-y-1 active:translate-y-2 active:translate-x-1 hover:shadow active:shadow-none. Currently missing in docs: (1) docs/src/styles/global.css search button (after line 289): add 'site-search button[data-open-modal]:active { box-shadow: none; transform: translate(1px, 2px); }'. (2) mobile menu button (after line 329): add 'starlight-menu-button button:active { box-shadow: none; transform: translate(1px, 2px); }'. (3) social icons (after line 345): add '.social-icons a:active { box-shadow: none; transform: translate(1px, 2px); }'. (4) ThemeSelect.astro line 25-27: change transform: translateY(2px) to transform: translate(1px, 2px).

userStories.title: Fix docs borders from 1px to 2px to match RetroUI universal border-2
userStories.description: As a developer, I want all borders in the docs to use 2px matching RetroUI's universal border-2 pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: docs/src/styles/global.css inline code border is 2px solid var(--border) instead of 1px
docs/src/styles/global.css table cell (th, td) border is 2px solid var(--border) instead of 1px
docs/src/styles/global.css sidebar group header summary border-bottom is 2px solid var(--border) instead of 1px
docs/src/styles/global.css search button kbd border is 2px solid var(--border) instead of 1px
userStories.notes: Four 1px borders that should be 2px: (1) line 246: .sl-markdown-content :not(pre) > code — border: 1px -> 2px. (2) line 259: .sl-markdown-content :is(th, td) — border: 1px -> 2px. (3) line 192: sidebar group header — border-bottom: 1px -> 2px. (4) line 292: search button kbd — border: 1px -> 2px. RetroUI uses border-2 (2px) on ALL bordered elements: Card, Input, Alert, Accordion, Button, Empty, Switch, Tab, Dialog. No exceptions.

userStories.title: Fix Footer link to use RetroUI anchor pattern
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the side panel Footer feedback link to match RetroUI Text as='a' hover styling.
acceptanceCriteria: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/Footer.tsx feedback link className includes 'hover:underline underline-offset-2 decoration-primary'
userStories.notes: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/Footer.tsx line 8: feedback link uses 'hover:text-foreground transition-colors'. RetroUI Text as='a' pattern (Text.tsx line 10): 'font-sans text-base hover:underline underline-offset-2 decoration-primary'. Add the RetroUI anchor hover pattern. Change className to: 'hover:text-foreground hover:underline underline-offset-2 decoration-primary transition-colors'.

userStories.title: Add cursor-pointer to side panel clear-filter button
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the clear-filter button to have cursor-pointer matching RetroUI's interactive element standard.
acceptanceCriteria: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/App.tsx clear filter button has cursor-pointer in its className
userStories.notes: platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/App.tsx line 213: button className is 'text-muted-foreground hover:text-foreground absolute top-1/2 right-5 -translate-y-1/2 translate-y-[4px]'. Missing cursor-pointer. RetroUI Button base (Button.tsx line 7) always includes cursor-pointer. Add cursor-pointer to the className string.
